creator: ggg_mail@inbox.ru
text:
Texmaker preferences allow to use UTF-8 as default encoding, thus newly created documents will have \usepackage{ucs} in them. An attempt to complile such document will produce an error - "ucs is not installed". Manual installation of latex-ucs port will solve this issue. I suppose it should be customised at the stage of texmaker installation to add latex-ucs as a dependency to texmaker.

Fix: 

Install latex-ucs port manually
How-To-Repeat: Set UTF-8 as your encoding in Texmaker preferences, try to compile a document
